# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="style" attrs=[]
        "body{content:\"</stylex><\\\\/style>\";}"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="div" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="em" attrs=[]
          "ok"
